# Sync docs

Read the changed code, tests, and architecture notes, then synchronize the nearest authoritative documentation.

Update as needed:
- `docs/specs/`
- `docs/adr/`
- `docs/runbooks/`
- `docs/glossary/`
- `docs/architecture/views/`
- Draw.io source/export files if architectural visuals changed

Return:
- what changed in behavior
- which docs were updated
- which docs were intentionally unchanged and why
- terminology changes
- follow-up risks or open questions
